ciGateMatrix.failurePolicy: any required gate red blocks merge; fixes on same branch; waivers owner-only and PR-recorded

qaReleaseGates: QA-1 local validation harness (first-screen, state clamps, logo gates, a11y, links) before owner review
QA-2 owner visual review (screenshots + preview; explicit APPROVE)
QA-5 pre-release (production): data-binding audit, publication gates G01–G13 + MI01–MI10 + SEO12, rollback plan
QA-6 post-deploy live QA (route smoke, CWV sample, state spot-checks) into status system

visualRegressionProcess.baselines: owner-assets/qa/visual-baselines/{surface}/{version}/ (committed via explicit promotion task on owner APPROVE)
visualRegressionProcess.ci: diff PR screenshots vs approved baseline; per-surface thresholds; above-threshold diffs require owner re-approval + new baseline version

statusSystem.updateResponsibility: Claude Code updates both files at every task completion, owner GO, or block event (when status update is in authorized scope); owner may edit decisions directly; CI validates JSON; MD regenerated from JSON, never hand-drifted

gateDefaults: everything false until explicitly granted; grants scoped and non-transferable; every grant recorded in the status system

localeGates.LOCALE01: country and language stored separately (countryCode/countrySlug + languageCode/localeTag); URL prefix derived, never one locale variable
localeGates.LOCALE02: routed market-language pair exists in the matrix registry (no Cartesian product)
localeGates.LOCALE05: language switch preserves route identity, country, slugs, safe query params, anchor
localeGates.LOCALE06: country switch targets only supported pairs; market-default fallback with visible notice
localeGates.LOCALE09: hreflang reciprocal and complete across LIVE siblings
localeGates.LOCALE10: x-default per approved rule (market clusters → market English variant; global clusters → global EN)
localeGates.LOCALE12: internal links stay in current market-language namespace
localeGates.LOCALE13: MI facts byte-identical across language siblings
localeGates.LOCALE14: country artwork identity identical across language siblings
localeGates.LOCALE16: market-level language support does not imply page-level translation (PageLocaleCoverage separate)
localeGates.LOCALE17: Ukrainian language code is uk; ua forbidden as languageCode
localeGates.LOCALE18: only LIVE PageLocaleCoverage variants enter hreflang, sitemap and production switchers
localeGates.LOCALE19: country-switch fallback explicit and visible (mandatory notice)
localeGates.LOCALE20: no unsupported market-language URL silently serves another language
localeGates.LOCALE21: exactly one marketDefault language per market
localeGates.LOCALE23: x-default points to the LIVE market-default page sibling
localeGates.LOCALE24: English fallback does not automatically make English the market default
localeGates.LOCALE25: all language siblings of a market use the same CountryVisualProfile identity

localeGatesEnforcement: ci-locale-lint + ci-seo-gates fail PRs on LOCALE01-LOCALE25 violations for touched routes
